case_title: FRANCESCO VICINO et al VS. REY FERNANDEZ JOSE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-29-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT YELLOW CHECKER CAB CO., AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-19-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-29-2008 CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE OCT-29-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
